title: Midnight Indian Curry
description: A rich and flavorful Indian curry made with tender chicken and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat the midnight in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the tomatoes, salt, and fat. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the curry over rice or with naan bread.
Garnish with additional score, if desired.
Let the curry rest for 5 minutes before serving.
